ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource entry */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nation owning the resource */,
  "oil_production" TEXT /* Oil production capacity */,
  "oil_reserves" TEXT /* Total oil reserves */,
  "uranium" TEXT /* Uranium availability */,
  "reactor" TEXT /* Nuclear reactor status */,
  "gold_reserves" TEXT /* Total gold reserves */,
  "iron_ore" TEXT /* Total iron ore reserves */,
  "coal_reserves" TEXT /* Total coal reserves */,
  "natural_gas_production" TEXT /* Natural gas production capacity */,
  "renewable_energy_production" TEXT /* Renewable energy production capacity */,
  "resource_extraction_rate" TEXT /* Rate of resource extraction */,
  "resource_extraction_cost" TEXT /* Cost of resource extraction */,
  "resource_efficiency" TEXT /* Efficiency of resource usage */,
  "resource_pollution" TEXT /* Pollution caused by resource extraction and usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economics" (
  "economics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic entry */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nation */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product */,
  "economic_system" TEXT /* Type of economic system (e.g., Free Market, Central Planning) */,
  "manpower" TEXT /* Manpower status */,
  "foreign_debt" TEXT /* Total foreign debt */,
  "trade_balance" TEXT /* Trade balance (exports - imports) */,
  "unemployment_rate" TEXT /* Current unemployment rate */,
  "inflation_rate" TEXT /* Current inflation rate */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Current exchange rate */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Current tax rate */,
  "investment_inflation" TEXT /* Inflation in investment */,
  "investment_growth_rate" TEXT /* Annual growth rate of investments */,
  "domestic_investment" TEXT /* Total domestic investment */,
  "foreign_investment" TEXT /* Total foreign investment */,
  "economic_policy" TEXT /* Current economic policy (e.g., liberal, conservative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "military" (
  "military_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each military entry */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nation */,
  "airforce" TEXT /* Status of the air force capability */,
  "army_size" TEXT /* Size of the army */,
  "navy_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the navy (e.g., weak, strong) */,
  "airforce_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the air force (e.g., weak, strong) */,
  "army_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the army (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "military_technology" TEXT /* Level of military technology (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "military_morale" TEXT /* Morale of the military (e.g., low, high) */,
  "military_readiness" TEXT /* Readiness of the military (e.g., low, high) */,
  "military_strategy" TEXT /* Current military strategy (e.g., defensive, aggressive) */,
  "military_training_programs" TEXT /* Current training programs */,
  "military_budget_allocation" TEXT /* Allocation of military budget (e.g., personnel, equipment, R&D) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("military_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leadership" (
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leader */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nation led */,
  "leader_name" TEXT /* Name of the leader */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Political alignment of the leader */,
  "leader_age" INTEGER /* Age of the leader */,
  "leader_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the leader */,
  "leader_education" TEXT /* Education level of the leader */,
  "leader_experience" TEXT /* Years of leadership experience */,
  "leader_policy" TEXT /* Leadership policy (e.g., liberal, conservative) */,
  "leader_popularity" TEXT /* Popularity of the leader (e.g., low, high) */,
  "leader_appearance" TEXT /* Physical appearance of the leader (e.g., image URL) */,
  "leader_ideology" TEXT /* Ideological stance of the leader (e.g., socialist, capitalist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alliances" (
  "alliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alliance */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participating nation */,
  "alliance_name" TEXT /* Name of the alliance */,
  "alliance_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the alliance (e.g., weak, strong) */,
  "alliance_benefits" TEXT /* List of benefits from the alliance */,
  "alliance_obligations" TEXT /* List of obligations to the alliance */,
  "alliance_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the alliance */,
  "alliance_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alliance (e.g., active, pending, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territory record */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nation owning the territory */,
  "territory_size" TEXT /* Size of the territory in square kilometers */,
  "territory_type" TEXT /* Type of territory (e.g., land, sea, air) */,
  "territory_defense" TEXT /* Defense capabilities of the territory */,
  "territory_resources" TEXT /* Natural resources available in the territory */,
  "territory_population" TEXT /* Population of the territory */,
  "territory_infrastructure" TEXT /* Quality of infrastructure in the territory */,
  "territory_security" TEXT /* Security level of the territory (e.g., low, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_centers" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training center */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nation */,
  "training_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of training facilities */,
  "training_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of trainees */,
  "training_programs" TEXT /* List of training programs offered */,
  "training_cost" TEXT /* Cost of training */,
  "training_time" TEXT /* Duration of training programs */,
  "training_efficacy" TEXT /* Efficacy of training programs (e.g., low, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factories" (
  "factory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factory record */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nation operating the factories */,
  "factory_count" INTEGER /* Count of factories producing resources */,
  "factory_type" TEXT /* Type of factory (e.g., military, civilian) */,
  "factory_output" TEXT /* Output of the factory */,
  "factory_efficiency" TEXT /* Efficiency of the factory (e.g., low, high) */,
  "factory_workers" INTEGER /* Number of workers in the factory */,
  "factory_technology" TEXT /* Level of technology used in the factory */,
  "factory_pollution" TEXT /* Pollution caused by the factory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "navy" (
  "navy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each navy record */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nation */,
  "navy_size" TEXT /* Size of the navy in terms of ships */,
  "navy_type" TEXT /* Type of navy (e.g., surface, submarine) */,
  "navy_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the navy (e.g., weak, strong) */,
  "navy_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the navy (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "navy_technology" TEXT /* Level of naval technology (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "navy_morale" TEXT /* Morale of the navy (e.g., low, high) */,
  "navy_readiness" TEXT /* Readiness of the navy (e.g., low, high) */,
  "navy_budget_allocation" TEXT /* Allocation of navy budget (e.g., personnel, equipment, R&D) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("navy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_history" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP record */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nation */,
  "gdp_value" TEXT /* GDP value recorded */,
  "recorded_year" INTEGER /* Year the GDP was recorded */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" TEXT /* Annual GDP growth rate */,
  "gdp_per_capita" TEXT /* GDP per capita */,
  "gdp_sector_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of GDP across sectors (e.g., agriculture, industry, services) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nation involved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., build, attack) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "activity_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the activity (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "activity_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the activity on the nation (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "activity_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the activity */,
  "activity_benefit" TEXT /* Benefit of the activity */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location where the activity took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)
